# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-app
  labels:
    app: web-app
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web
        image: your-web-app-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
        env:
        - name: CACHE_HOST
          value: "memcached-service"

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached
  labels:
    app: memcached
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: memcached
        image: memcached:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 11211

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: background-workers
  labels:
    app: background-workers
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: background-workers
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: background-workers
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: worker
        image: your-worker-image:latest
        env:
        - name: CACHE_HOST
          value: "memcached-service"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: memcached
  ports:
  - port: 11211
    targetPort: 11211
